## Ownership Area

## Validation

- [ ] I reviewed the changed files.
- [ ] I ran the relevant unit tests or documented why they do not apply.
- [ ] I verified that no API keys, passwords, or generated build files are committed.
- [ ] I synced the branch with `main` before requesting review.

## Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] The pull request is focused on one issue.
- [ ] Naming and commit messages are readable.
- [ ] Architecture and ownership boundaries are respected.
- [ ] Error handling and security concerns are covered.
- [ ] Validation evidence is appropriate for the change.
